title: senecillis schizopetala
intro: Senecillis schizopetala, also known as Pericallis schizopetala, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the Canary Islands and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Senecillis schizopetala include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
